view.title: Tiketi {id}
view.subject: Isiokwu
view.ipHelpText: Ọ bụrụ na njikọ si na adreesị IP dị iche. Biko gbanwee ya.
view.passwordEncrypted: A na-echekwa paswọọdụ na databees ezobe ọdịiche.
view.ticketClosed: Tiketi a mechiri, ya mere agbanyụọla ọzaazị. Ọ bụrụ na ị ka chọrọ enyemaka, mepee tiketi ọhụụ anyị ga-eteketị inyere gị aka.
view.replyPlaceholder: Ozi zuru ezu banyere nsogbu ahụ
view.replyHint: Imepụta tiketi ọdịiche maka nsogbu ọhụụ na-enyere otu anyị aka ịhaziri ma dozie ha ngwa ngwa.

new.title: Tiketi Ọhụụ
new.subject: Isiokwu
new.subjectValidation: Biko tinye nkọwa dị mkpụmkpụ banyere nsogbu ahụ.
new.descriptionPlaceholder: Daalụ maka inyere anyị aka iji nọchi sistemụ nkwado site n'ịzipu arịọ otu maka tiketi ọ bụla.
new.descriptionValidation: Biko tinye nkọwa zuru ezu banyere nsogbu ahụ.
new.fileNote: Nrọtọ: Naanị faịlụ ọchịchọ - ụdị gif/jpeg/png bụ ndị ekwere.
new.allowAccessLabel: Akwenyere m ka InterServer nwee nnweta server m ma mee mgbanwe
new.accessNote: Biko mara: Site n'imepụta arịọ nkwado InterServer nwere ike ịhụ mkpa ịnweta, ịdepụta njehie, ma ọ bụ gbanwee faịlụ na akaụntụ gị. Achọrọ ihe a iji nye nkwado teknụzụ. Biko gaa n'ihu naanị ma ọ bụrụ na ị kwenye.
